agentMessage.excerpt: Added `getAttrDef(tagName, attrName)` to `apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.ts` (delegates to `getTagDef` for case-insensitive tag resolution, then case-insensitive attribute lookup) and four `describe('getAttrDef', ...)` test cases in `apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.test.ts` covering known attribute, case-insensitive match, unknown tag, and known-tag/unknown-attribute.
